chunks.title: Oracle Against Baasha
chunks.reason: A prophetic judgment pronounced against King Baasha and his house for following Jeroboam's sins.

chunks.title: Reign and Death of Elah
chunks.reason: Narrative account of King Elah's short reign, his assassination by Zimri, and the fulfillment of the oracle.

chunks.title: Reign and Death of Zimri
chunks.reason: Brief account of Zimri's seven-day reign and his suicide as the army besieged Tirzah.

chunks.title: Rise of Omri
chunks.reason: Narrative of the civil war between Omri and Tibni, culminating in Omri's victory and establishment of Samaria.

chunks.title: Reign of Ahab
chunks.reason: Introduction of King Ahab, his marriage to Jezebel, worship of Baal, and the fulfillment of Joshua's prophecy regarding Jericho.
